description: Drug smuggling groups based in the Spanish region of Galicia, known as a main European entry point for Colombian cocaine. They evolved from tobacco smuggling by local fishermen and now traffic cocaine, hashish, and heroin using contacts in Colombia and Morocco. The groups are involved in violent feuds, murder, and political corruption, with some clans financing local communities for popular support.

country_links.evidence_quote: Based in Madrid, Andalusia and parts of the Americas like Belize most notably Ambergris Caye and Corozal
country_links.context: The Contreras, De la Hoz clan is based in parts of the Americas like Belize, most notably Ambergris Caye and Corozal.

country_links.evidence_quote: Using their Colombian and Moroccan contacts, Galician organized crime groups traffic cocaine and hashish, aside from illegal tobacco, into the Spanish mainland.
country_links.context: Galician organized crime groups use their Colombian contacts to traffic cocaine and hashish into Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Spain , Portugal , France , Italy , United Kingdom
country_links.context: The Galician mafia has territory in France.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Spain , Portugal , France , Italy , United Kingdom
country_links.context: The Galician mafia has territory in Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Using their Colombian and Moroccan contacts, Galician organized crime groups traffic cocaine and hashish, aside from illegal tobacco, into the Spanish mainland.
country_links.context: Galician organized crime groups use their Moroccan contacts to traffic hashish into Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: Drugs are frequently trafficked to the neighbouring regions of Portugal northern as well.
country_links.context: Drugs are trafficked from Galicia to the neighbouring regions of Portugal.

country_links.evidence_quote: British Firms have set up contacts in Galicia, often working together with Galician criminal clans to bring in narcotics which the British gangs in turn smuggle into and distribute in the United Kingdom.
country_links.context: British gangs work with Galician clans to smuggle narcotics into and distribute in the United Kingdom.
